global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text and interactive elements.
global.main_message: Promoting flexible flight booking options with a discount.

elements.label: Orange abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background with abstract shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: HorizonHop
elements.description: Bold, large text displaying the brand name 'HorizonHop' in a prominent position at the top.

elements.label: Fly smarter
elements.description: Text that reads 'Fly smarter' in a clean, modern font, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Smaller text below 'Fly smarter' that states 'Flexible booking options', conveying additional information.

elements.label: Try for free
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: 30% discount
elements.description: A small badge displaying '30%' in a bold font, indicating a discount offer.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Several circular shapes in varying sizes, adding a decorative touch to the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative icon
elements.description: A small icon positioned at the top, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Flexible booking options

elements.label: Call to action

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating a '30%' discount, visually appealing and eye-catching.
